posts.author: MaraJenkins
posts.text: Hi everyone, quick update on my account! Please click this link [link removed] to reset your password and authorise a deposit of £450. I need to verify your security code to complete the transfer before 6pm.
posts.explanation: This post is clearly a credential-harvesting and payment phishing attempt because it directly solicits a password and security code to authorise a financial transfer via a link.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
